name: colyseus-client
description: Colyseus client SDK reference for TypeScript/JavaScript. Covers Client class, room connection methods (joinOrCreate, join, create, joinById, reconnect), sending/receiving messages, state listening (getStateCallbacks), room events, reconnection with backoff, latency measurement, HTTP utilities, multi-region selection, full-stack type safety, and debug panel. Use when connecting to a Colyseus server, listening for state changes, handling messages, or implementing reconnection.
